title: Less Context, Better Agents: Efficient Context Engineering for Long-Horizon Tool-Using LLM Agents
summary: Less Context, Better Agents: Efficient Context Engineering for Long-Horizon Tool-Using LLM Agents
whyItMatters: Large language models deployed as autonomous agents for enterprise workflows face a key challenge: verbose tool responses from enterprise systems can cause context overflow, stale-state errors, and high inference cost. We study this problem in automated expense itemization in Microsoft Dynamics 365 Finance and Operations using Model Context Protocol tools.…
